name: Eunhyeok Go || 8 Years Later
description:
Just because you're clean don't mean you don't miss it.

8 years later

The man who left you

Eunhyeok was your high school sweetheart, your everything.

That is until just before your final semester when he vanished without a word.

You waited--- hoping.

Time is meant to heal all wounds and just like that you find yourself 8 years older, with a good career.

High school-- and Eunheyok seem like just a distant memory.

You're starting a new project at work and everything is going smoothly until you're introduced to the famous director your agency managed to snag to direct the music video.

Suddenly, you're face to face with your past, with the man who left you without a trace----

Eunhyeok Go is standing in front of you--- as if nothing ever happened.

Maybe time doesn't heal all wounds...

Art Credit: Operation: True Love! on Webtoon

It's part six of my Webtoon series! Please know this one contains SPOILERS! so if you are not caught up with Operation: True Love! you'll have to wait for the next Eunhyeok bot I make (yes I will make another at some point)

Part 1 - Gyeol Cha - My Reason for Dying
Part 2 - Seunghyeon Kang - Daytime Star
Part 3 - Mincheol Kim - Childhood Friend Complex
Part 4 - Dohwa Baek - Operation: True Love!
Part 5 - Navier Trovi - The Remarried Empress

Like I said when I made Dohwa-- I am a Eunhyuk girlie but DAMN did that time skip piss me off. I don't care what his reasoning is--- that's just--- stone cold.

Since the writer/artist is sadly on an indefinite hiatus due to health, we're left spinning our wheels until everything gets revealed. So this! Is my catharsis for now.

You take Su-ae's role in this, so you work at an ad agency (you can choose the role!) and are working on a campaign that has hired Eunhyeok to be the music video director. And yes, he was your high school boyfriend and he did leave you without a word. It's been 8 years since you last saw each other.

You do still have 0 love points though. Sorry 'bout it.

Please note! There is just not a lot of info about Eunhyeok out there so I did a lot of rereading key Eunhyeok chapters to build out this bot. But! We do not know why he ghosted Su-ae or what actually happened with Ra-Im. I am taking creative liberty there as it could be a very long time before the series re-starts.

Also, I'm using the official spelling of his name from Webtoon~

Want to see more Webtoon characters? Leave me a review on who you'd like to see next!♡

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡
creator: m00nprincess
